title: SIDBI SVCL – Company Secretary cum Compliance Officer

basic_details.job_title: SIDBI SVCL Company Secretary cum Compliance Officer Recruitment 2025 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The SIDBI Venture Capital (SIDBI SVCL) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Company Secretary cum Compliance Officer posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline through the official SIDBI SVCL website. The last date to submit the application form is 29-05-2026.

faq.answer: Ans: Starting Date to apply is 29-05-2025.

faq.question: Ans:
faq.answer: As a recruitment lead writer & editor, I focus on delivering accurate, authentic, and valuable job-related information to our readers. Sourcing updates from official government and institutional channels and analyzing them to present clear, reliable guidance is a key part of my role. I bring over five years of experience in professional content writing, including more than two and a half years specializing in recruitment, education, and career-focused content.
